title: Create items in any board in monday.com from outlook (web or app)

posts.author: mpnrf (Kat)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

This third-party service offers this service, but we’d love if the integration came direct from monday to maintain HIPPA compliance: Outlook Integration – Installation & User Guide – ESL

What are you trying to achieve

  1. Create items in any workspace/board in monday from outlook (web or app)
  2. Add item updates from within Outlook
  3. Edit items from within outlook
  4. Ideally create an automatic link to the corresponding email
  5. (additional features welcome)
